description: Proposal that would otherwise pass the verifier (trusted-money shape, proposal content byte-identical to core-allow-002-trusted-money) is rejected with PIC_TOOL_BINDING_MISMATCH because options.expected_tool='wrong_tool' does not match proposal.action.tool='payments_send'. Exercises the tool-binding enforcement rule in isolation: the proposal itself is verifier-clean; only the options field flips the outcome. Paired with core-allow-002-trusted-money, the only content-level difference across the two vectors is the presence of this options field.
source: adapted from tests/conftest.py money_proposal fixture; proposal content identical to core-allow-002-trusted-money, only options.expected_tool differs; exercises the rule that under options.expected_tool, any mismatch between expected_tool and proposal.action.tool is rejected with PIC_TOOL_BINDING_MISMATCH
